analysis.reasoning: Core message: China emphasizes solidarity, cooperation with other countries, and perseverance leading to victory over the pandemic, positioning itself as working for humanity’s collective success. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; the tweet highlights China’s cooperative stance, solidarity, and working for humanity’s final victory, aligning with multilateralism and altruism. CH3 (epic history) – No historical or resilience-through-adversity framing tied to CCP history. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No claims about domestic governance performance or leadership achievements. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
